label: Bundle Builder
description: Multi-leg bundle workflow in one widget: template gallery (collapsible drawer), draggable step editor with per-row operation/venue/instrument/price/qty, real-time P&L KPI strip (buy notional, sell notional, gas est., net P&L), and simulate/execute actions.

0.6.note: readOnly guard disables edit controls; empty-steps state renders empty scaffold.

0.7.note: Empty steps shows 'No steps yet' empty state with Add Step CTA.

0.8.note: toast.error used for execution error feedback.

l0.notes: All L0 checks pass. Merged from bundle-templates + bundle-steps + bundle-pnl + bundle-actions (WU-2, 2026-04-22).

1.2.note: bundles-data-context.tsx reads useGlobalScope() for org/client/strategy filtering.

1.3.note: Org scope gates bundle execution via readOnly flag from context.

1.6.note: No scope = readOnly mode, all edit actions disabled.

1.7.note: operationTypes and venues from context (derived from mock fixture data).

l2.notes: Build passes post-merge (WU-2 commit 2ff874e). Vitest suite passes.

3.1.note: readOnly=false (live): all edit controls enabled. readOnly=true: controls disabled.

3.2.note: readOnly propagated from bundles-data-context based on scope completeness.

3.5.note: Template drawer toggled by showTemplates flag; loadTemplate mutates steps array.

4.1.note: Add/Remove/Duplicate/Move step buttons all wired. Load Template, Clear, Simulate, Execute all wired to context handlers. Drag handles present (GripVertical icon) — actual DnD via moveStep.

4.6.note: P&L metrics derived in context via useMemo.

5.1.note: Supports all operationTypes (BUY/SELL/SWAP/BRIDGE/STAKE). Per-step venue + instrument selects driven by context arrays. Template gallery shows strategy-tagged templates. KPI strip updates live as steps change.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 25 tests covering root testid, empty state, Add leg, template gallery toggle, step navigation (move up/down), remove/duplicate step, submit bundle enable/disable, submit toast payload, KPI strip labels. See tests/widgets/bundles/bundle-builder.test.tsx

7.1.note: No hardcoded hex/rgb. getOperationColor/getOperationBadgeClass from lib/utils/bundles. CLEAN.

7.3.note: 521 lines — above 500-line soft limit but justified by merged 4-widget workflow.

7.4.note: BundleBuilderWidget PascalCase, useBundlesData useCamelCase, file kebab-case. CLEAN.

7.6.note: No dangerouslySetInnerHTML, eval, new Function. CLEAN.

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback in widget file. All state in context. CLEAN.

8.1.note: No arbitrary text-[Xpx]. Uses text-xs/text-sm standard tokens. CLEAN.

8.3.note: Uses Button, Input, Select, Badge, Separator, CollapsibleSection, KpiStrip, WidgetScroll. CLEAN.

8.4.note: Labels present on step-row controls. Human keyboard nav check required.

keepSeparate.rationale: Merged host widget. defi-atomic-bundle stays independent — it covers the atomic on-chain DeFi execution path which is structurally different from the multi-step CeFi/cross-venue bundle workflow.

relationships.notes: Merged from 4 co-dependent widgets (WU-2, 2026-04-22). Template gallery, step editor, P&L strip, and execute actions are all internal sections of this widget rather than separate mounted components.

dataContract.notes: Execute action is mock in dev mode. Live path requires bundle execution API endpoint.

gaps: Drag-and-drop reorder uses moveStep (index swap) — no HTML5 DnD or dnd-kit; visual drag feedback absent
Simulate action is a stub (no backend simulation endpoint wired)
coverage.notes: Primary execution surface for multi-leg bundles.

knownIssues: 521 lines — above 500-line soft limit; acceptable for merged workflow
Simulate action stub — backend simulation endpoint not yet wired
